response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the available song structure for '#Kyururun Daisakusen'. Discarded the 2-minute instrumental intro as per the 'Golden Rule' (no vocals). Subtitles are tightly wrapped to vocal bursts. Verified lyrics from audio and character context (Pekora's 'peko', Marine's 'Ahoy'). Split long 'I love you' strings to stay under character limits while maintaining semantic continuity and tight wrap to the audio timing.

subtitles.original: I-I-I-I-I love you　も
subtitles.english: I-I-I-I-I love you and

subtitles.original: I-I-I-I-I need you
subtitles.english: I-I-I-I-I need you

subtitles.original: もっと　もっと　もっと
subtitles.english: More, more, more,

subtitles.original: 好きなだけ愛させて
subtitles.english: let me love you as much as I want.

subtitles.original: さいこーのライブ、いくぺこー！
subtitles.english: The best live, let's go peko!

subtitles.original: みんなでさいこーの思い出つくろーね！
subtitles.english: Let's make the best memories together!

subtitles.original: ズルルのない　君だらけ
subtitles.english: Full of you, with no cheating,

subtitles.original: 溶かしてるわ　私
subtitles.english: I'm melting away.

subtitles.original: 心臓ドキドキ　なってる
subtitles.english: My heart is pounding.

subtitles.original: OK? How about?
subtitles.english: OK? How about it?

subtitles.original: 毎日　幻覚あらわれて
subtitles.english: Hallucinations appear every day,

subtitles.original: 頭に　花咲いちゃって
subtitles.english: and flowers bloom in my head.

subtitles.original: 恋ってやつは　非日常ですわ
subtitles.english: This thing called love is extraordinary.

subtitles.original: いっそ　食べちゃいたい
subtitles.english: I'd rather just eat you up,

subtitles.original: フリーズした　感情
subtitles.english: these frozen emotions...

subtitles.original: 誰もが持ってる　お願い
subtitles.english: The wish everyone has.

subtitles.original: 純純　萌萌っしょ
subtitles.english: Pure, pure, moe, moe, right?

subtitles.original: ドバっと　急上昇
subtitles.english: Surging up all at once.

subtitles.original: これが恋なら　もう後悔しないわ
subtitles.english: If this is love, I won't regret it anymore.

subtitles.original: だから　君のこと
subtitles.english: So, it's you that I...

subtitles.original: 大好き大好き大好き大好き　大好き
subtitles.english: love, love, love, love, I love you!

subtitles.original: 溢れる　この愛は　きっと　ずっと　止まらない
subtitles.english: This overflowing love surely will never stop.

subtitles.original: I-I-I-I-I love you　君が
subtitles.english: I-I-I-I-I love you, because

subtitles.original: I-I-I-I-I need you
subtitles.english: I-I-I-I-I need you.

subtitles.original: もっと　もっと　もっと
subtitles.english: More, more, more,

subtitles.original: 好きなだけ愛させて
subtitles.english: let me love you as much as I want.

subtitles.original: 揺れるハートが　ぴょんぴょんぴょん
subtitles.english: My shaking heart goes boing boing boing,

subtitles.original: 穴に落ちて　あびゃびゃびゃ
subtitles.english: falling into a hole and going abya-bya-bya.

subtitles.original: こんなになっても　いまだ抜け出せない
subtitles.english: Even like this, I still can't get out.

subtitles.original: どうしたもんかね　ぬいぬいぬい
subtitles.english: What should I do? Nui-nui-nui.

subtitles.original: 助けて君たち　あほーいほーい
subtitles.english: Save me, you guys! Ahoy-hoy!

subtitles.original: もっと　もっと　もっと
subtitles.english: More, more, more,

subtitles.original: 好きなだけ愛してね
subtitles.english: love me as much as you want.

subtitles.original: フワフワ　夢のなか
subtitles.english: Fluffy, inside a dream,

subtitles.original: 君の声で　目が覚めた
subtitles.english: I woke up to your voice.

subtitles.original: 五感ぜんぶが　君のシグナル
subtitles.english: All my five senses are your signals.

subtitles.original: 毎度　お騒がせごめん
subtitles.english: Sorry for the disturbance every time,

subtitles.original: キュンで　壊れちゃいそう
subtitles.english: I feel like I'll break from the heart-throbs.

subtitles.original: 恋ってやつは　制御不能ですわ
subtitles.english: This thing called love is uncontrollable.

subtitles.original: いっそ　抱きしめて
subtitles.english: I'd rather you just hug me,

subtitles.original: 壊しても　いいよ
subtitles.english: it's okay if you break me.

subtitles.original: 誰にも邪魔は　させない
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone get in the way.

subtitles.original: ピチピチ　感情で
subtitles.english: With fresh, lively emotions,

subtitles.original: キラキラ　急展開
subtitles.english: sparkling, sudden developments.

subtitles.original: これが運命なら　もう迷わないわ
subtitles.english: If this is fate, I won't hesitate anymore.

subtitles.original: 覚悟してね　君だけが
subtitles.english: Get ready, because I love you alone,

subtitles.original: 大好き大好き大好き大好き　大好き
subtitles.english: love you, love you, love you, I love you!

subtitles.original: 私の　この愛は　じっと　ずっと　離さない
subtitles.english: This love of mine will never, ever let go.

subtitles.original: B-B-B-B-B My Baby　そして
subtitles.english: B-B-B-B-B My Baby, and then

subtitles.original: K-K-K-K-K Kiss Me
subtitles.english: K-K-K-K-K Kiss Me.

subtitles.original: もっと　もっと　もっと
subtitles.english: More, more, more,

subtitles.original: 私だけを見ててね
subtitles.english: please only look at me.
